untranslatable_reason: Flag pattern identification requires detection of two parallel trend lines and precise measurement of trend steepness/duration. These geometric pattern properties (parallel line slopes, angle calculations, formation duration tracking) cannot be expressed using only the allowed point-in-time indicators (RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands, etc.). Bollinger Bands were used as a proxy for price bounds, but true flag pattern detection requires trend line analysis and time-series slope calculations not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Pattern recognition for flags fundamentally requires identifying parallel trend lines and measuring their slopes relative to price action over a specific time window. The allowed indicators are point-in-time technical indicators that cannot replicate this geometric pattern matching. A proper implementation would require custom trend line detection logic or pattern recognition algorithms external to these standard indicators.
